global.description: The ad features a vibrant layout showcasing various products with engaging text and calls to action.
global.main_message: Explore and shop bestsellers from CrispBox.

elements.label: Colorful gradient background
elements.description: A vibrant gradient background that transitions from pink to white, creating a lively atmosphere.

elements.label: Product showcase
elements.description: A central display featuring various products arranged in a visually appealing manner.

elements.label: Product showcase
elements.description: Another product display with a focus on colorful items, enhancing the visual interest.

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: The logo of CrispBox prominently displayed at the top, featuring bold typography.

elements.label: Favorite pick message
elements.description: Text that reads 'Your next favorite pick' in a friendly font, inviting users to explore.

elements.label: Shop now message
elements.description: Text that encourages users to shop bestsellers, presented in an engaging style.

elements.label: Product description
elements.description: Additional product information displayed in a smaller font, complementing the main message.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Start now' that stands out against the background.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge indicating a sale, designed to catch the viewer's attention.

elements.label: Additional product info
elements.description: Text that provides further details about the products, enhancing user engagement.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Shop bestsellers now

elements.description: The CrispBox logo displayed prominently, reinforcing brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: CrispBox, interstitial format, bright and colorful visual style, featuring product showcases and calls to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, main subjects are centered, and CTAs are positioned at the bottom.
